TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Seediq Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://trv.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv, title = {Seediq Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: = Madaljalu = Gaga mniq Taytung Cinfungsyang ka alang Madaljalu. 99 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 278 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 98% niqan 273 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 2% niqan 5 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Hangan alang Alang Ma-ta-ya-ru(Madaljalu) Pnseanak alang Kika alang empitu Cya-ran-cun dha. Nniqan Tay-tung-syeyn Cin-fung-syang Cya-ran-cun. Llbangan Ga pyasan tgciway Cya-ran hiya. Nniqan llingay Dxgal dgiyaq. Pgkla ppanan rulu Paah Tay-ma-ri-syang Tay-he-cun mquri mgriq Tay-9 syeyn kghak elug 64 syen, mquri gqiyan hidaw mksa yaa bi 5 km do, dhuq nniqan alang da. Mlutuc Teyn-c ti-tu Teyn-c ti-tu alang. Klgan seejiq alang Pay-wan-cu. Skari kari kari Pay-wan, kari Tlu. Snhiyaan cung-cyaw Ci-tu-cyaw, Teyn-cu-cyaw. Pnyahan alang Pneiyah daya C-ben-si na"Qa-a-ru-wan"thjil hini sayang. Mniq siyaw yayung Tay-ma-ri ka Cya-ran-cun, "Pu-ru-pu-ru-seng"ka plalay hangan na (PULER PULRE SHEN )(mhjil kari:Egu rulung ni rbuq ka dxgal), spuwan empitu paru alang, lnkuwan Tanah Tunux siida ka Tay-wan o ida dhiya ka kmlawa kana seejiq, hngkawas 28 muri dha pniq yayung C-pen, yayung Ma-ri-wu, yayung Ma-nu-ran, daya yayung Ma-ri- tow-pu dalang ka thjil.Hngkawas 34 idas 10 jiyax 25 ga ini klwai ka Tay-wan do khuway miyah thjil hini ka kana alang sayang. Pgkla rgrigan kwan-kwang Iyux qmlahang dmuuy quri endaan seejiq, ida nkiya, qhjing dnii ni dmudug smikul nkiya kndkilan rrigan. Cing-fung-syang Kung-sywo ga kdadax kngkawas 87 prajing mowda kana ka ddaun"Cing-fung-syang Qa-a-ru-wan Se-cyu hniygan syow- seyn-cyu; Kiya ni hngkawas 90 do gmbgurah "Qhjing Cing-fung ssaan rgrigan", duri ni smikul dmudug ida nkiya kndkilan llusun kana ka duma na qqpahun rmigaw. Saw ka qqpahun kung-yi, qqpahun wun-hwa, tqiyan seejiqni uuqun alang dnii, iyux pkrana ngalan hbangan klealang. Duma uri o, ida llabang bi hnmaan Rwo-sen-hwa ka Cya-ran-cun, kiya do kngkingal hngkawas ida muda "rrigan uda knklaan Rwo-sen-hwa" . Rahuq na pndaan kleegan uuda do, ida srabang spuan qqpahan uuqun tnealang, mangal "Rwo-sen-hwa" ka pusu bi knshyaan uuqun. Kngkingal hnpuyan damac o, ida bnsyaqan qmnqur qqpahan emphapuy tnealang, niqan lhang, knux ni shiya ida niqan kana, qulung dha tdhuun balay. Rgrigan: ‚óéťáĎŚ≥įśļęś≥Č Qhjing/Ulay Cin-fung Qhjing Cin-fung ga niqan Kwang-wu-cyu ka qmqur hmrinas maxal kbkuy na braru qhjing, qhjing o pndaan Syey-ya-tung pusa kaw-ya kaw-wun, embhgay qrngul niya o asi usa karac baraw ni saw bi hnang qung-rung rung! rung! msa.Ida ungac hari qtaan ka "mjiras qhjing". Qtaan bnatas Lwo-seng-hwa-syang-Cing-fung-syang-kung-syow. ca.gov.tw/community/newpage/aboutus.php?CommID=412 Tay-wan-se-cyu-tung - Tay-tung-seyn Cing-fung- syang Cya-ran- se-cyu. ťáĎŚ≥įťĄČ Cing-fung-syang
S.PHON: = madal…üalu = gaga mniq tajtuŇč ¶in*uŇčsjaŇč ka alaŇč madal…üalu. ** sapańß ka kn…ô…ôgu na sapańß, *** ńßiji ka kana knńßb…ĺagan na ńßiji. tnpusu s…ô…ô…üiq o maŇčal **% niqan *** ńßiji sp, …ĺańßuq na uxaj tnpusu s…ô…ô…üiq o maŇčal *% niqan * ńßiji koia. kana ka kl…ô…ôgan s…ô…ô…üiq ga, ńßaŇčan alaŇč alaŇč ma-ta-ja-…ĺu(madal…üalu) pns…ôanak alaŇč kika alaŇč …ômpitu ¶ja-…ĺan- ¶un dńßa. nniqan taj-tuŇč-sj…ôn ¶in-*uŇč-sjaŇč ¶ja-…ĺan- ¶un. llbaŇčan ga pjasan tg ¶iwaj ¶ja-…ĺan ńßija. nniqan lliŇčaj dxgal dgijaq. pgkla ppanan …ĺulu paańß taj-ma-…ĺi-sjaŇč taj-ńß…ô- ¶un mqu…ĺi mg…ĺiq taj-* sj…ôn kgńßak …ôlug ** sj…ôn, mqu…ĺi gqijan ńßidaw mksa jaa bi * km do, dńßuq nniqan alaŇč da. mlutu ¶ t…ôn- ¶ ti-tu t…ôn- ¶ ti-tu alaŇč. klgan s…ô…ô…üiq alaŇč paj-wan- ¶u. ska…ĺi ka…ĺi ka…ĺi paj-wan, ka…ĺi tlu. snńßijaan ¶uŇč- ¶jaw ¶i-tu- ¶jaw, t…ôn- ¶u- ¶jaw. pnjańßan alaŇč pn…ôijańß daja ¶-b…ôn-si na"qa-a-…ĺu-wan"tńß…üil ńßini sajaŇč. mniq sijaw jajuŇč taj-ma-…ĺi ka ¶ja-…ĺan- ¶un, "pu-…ĺu-pu-…ĺu-s…ôŇč"ka plalaj ńßaŇčan na (pul…ô…ĺ pul…ĺ…ô sńß…ôn )(mńß…üil ka…ĺi:…ôgu …ĺuluŇč ni …ĺbuq ka dxgal), spuwan …ômpitu pa…ĺu alaŇč, lnkuwan tanańß tunux siida ka taj-wan o ida dńßija ka kmlawa kana s…ô…ô…üiq, ńßŇčkawas ** mu…ĺi dńßa pniq jajuŇč ¶-p…ôn, jajuŇč ma-…ĺi-wu, jajuŇč ma-nu-…ĺan, daja jajuŇč ma-…ĺi- tow-pu dalaŇč ka tńß…üil.ńßŇčkawas ** idas ** …üijax ** ga ini klwai ka taj-wan do kńßuwaj mijańß tńß…üil ńßini ka kana alaŇč sajaŇč. pgkla …ĺg…ĺigan kwan-kwaŇč ijux qmlańßaŇč dmuuj qu…ĺi …ôndaan s…ô…ô…üiq, ida nkija, qńß…üiŇč dnii ni dmudug smikul nkija kndkilan …ĺ…ĺigan. ¶iŇč-*uŇč-sjaŇč kuŇč-sjwo ga kdadax kŇčkawas ** p…ĺa…üiŇč mowda kana ka ddaun" ¶iŇč-*uŇč-sjaŇč qa-a-…ĺu-wan s…ô- ¶ju ńßnijgan sjow- s…ôn- ¶ju; kija ni ńßŇčkawas ** do gmbgu…ĺańß "qńß…üiŇč ¶iŇč-*uŇč ssaan …ĺg…ĺigan", du…ĺi ni smikul dmudug ida nkija kndkilan llusun kana ka duma na qqpańßun …ĺmigaw. saw ka qqpańßun kuŇč-ji, qqpańßun wun-ńßwa, tqijan s…ô…ô…üiqni uuqun alaŇč dnii, ijux pk…ĺana Ňčalan ńßbaŇčan kl…ôalaŇč. duma u…ĺi o, ida llabaŇč bi ńßnmaan …ĺwo-s…ôn-ńßwa ka ¶ja-…ĺan- ¶un, kija do kŇčkiŇčal ńßŇčkawas ida muda "…ĺ…ĺigan uda knklaan …ĺwo-s…ôn-ńßwa" . …ĺańßuq na pndaan kl…ô…ôgan uuda do, ida s…ĺabaŇč spuan qqpańßan uuqun tn…ôalaŇč, maŇčal "…ĺwo-s…ôn-ńßwa" ka pusu bi knsńßjaan uuqun. kŇčkiŇčal ńßnpujan dama ¶ o, ida bnsjaqan qmnqu…ĺ qqpańßan …ômpńßapuj tn…ôalaŇč, niqan lńßaŇč, knux ni sńßija ida niqan kana, quluŇč dńßa tdńßuun balaj. …ĺg…ĺigan: ***** qńß…üiŇč/ulaj ¶in-*uŇč qńß…üiŇč ¶in-*uŇč ga niqan kwaŇč-wu- ¶ju ka qmqu…ĺ ńßm…ĺinas maxal kbkuj na b…ĺa…ĺu qńß…üiŇč, qńß…üiŇč o pndaan sj…ô-ja-tuŇč pusa kaw-ja kaw-wun, …ômbńßgaj q…ĺŇčul nija o asi usa ka…ĺa ¶ ba…ĺaw ni saw bi ńßnaŇč quŇč-…ĺuŇč …ĺuŇč! …ĺuŇč! msa.ida uŇča ¶ ńßa…ĺi qtaan ka "m…üi…ĺas qńß…üiŇč". qtaan bnatas lwo-s…ôŇč-ńßwa-sjaŇč- ¶iŇč-*uŇč-sjaŇč-kuŇč-sjow. ¶a.go*.tw/ ¶ommunitj/n…ôwpag…ô/aboutus.pńßp? ¶ommid=*** taj-wan-s…ô- ¶ju-tuŇč - taj-tuŇč-s…ôn ¶iŇč-*uŇč- sjaŇč ¶ja-…ĺan- s…ô- ¶ju. *** ¶iŇč-*uŇč-sjaŇč
S.FORM: = Madaljalu = Gaga mniq Taytung Cinfungsyang ka alang Madaljalu. 99 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 278 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 98% niqan 273 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 2% niqan 5 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Hangan alang Alang Ma-ta-ya-ru(Madaljalu) Pnseanak alang Kika alang empitu Cya-ran-cun dha. Nniqan Tay-tung-syeyn Cin-fung-syang Cya-ran-cun. Llbangan Ga pyasan tgciway Cya-ran hiya. Nniqan llingay Dxgal dgiyaq. Pgkla ppanan rulu Paah Tay-ma-ri-syang Tay-he-cun mquri mgriq Tay-9 syeyn kghak elug 64 syen, mquri gqiyan hidaw mksa yaa bi 5 km do, dhuq nniqan alang da. Mlutuc Teyn-c ti-tu Teyn-c ti-tu alang. Klgan seejiq alang Pay-wan-cu. Skari kari kari Pay-wan, kari Tlu. Snhiyaan cung-cyaw Ci-tu-cyaw, Teyn-cu-cyaw. Pnyahan alang Pneiyah daya C-ben-si na"Qa-a-ru-wan"thjil hini sayang. Mniq siyaw yayung Tay-ma-ri ka Cya-ran-cun, "Pu-ru-pu-ru-seng"ka plalay hangan na (PULER PULRE SHEN )(mhjil kari:Egu rulung ni rbuq ka dxgal), spuwan empitu paru alang, lnkuwan Tanah Tunux siida ka Tay-wan o ida dhiya ka kmlawa kana seejiq, hngkawas 28 muri dha pniq yayung C-pen, yayung Ma-ri-wu, yayung Ma-nu-ran, daya yayung Ma-ri- tow-pu dalang ka thjil.Hngkawas 34 idas 10 jiyax 25 ga ini klwai ka Tay-wan do khuway miyah thjil hini ka kana alang sayang. Pgkla rgrigan kwan-kwang Iyux qmlahang dmuuy quri endaan seejiq, ida nkiya, qhjing dnii ni dmudug smikul nkiya kndkilan rrigan. Cing-fung-syang Kung-sywo ga kdadax kngkawas 87 prajing mowda kana ka ddaun"Cing-fung-syang Qa-a-ru-wan Se-cyu hniygan syow- seyn-cyu; Kiya ni hngkawas 90 do gmbgurah "Qhjing Cing-fung ssaan rgrigan", duri ni smikul dmudug ida nkiya kndkilan llusun kana ka duma na qqpahun rmigaw. Saw ka qqpahun kung-yi, qqpahun wun-hwa, tqiyan seejiqni uuqun alang dnii, iyux pkrana ngalan hbangan klealang. Duma uri o, ida llabang bi hnmaan Rwo-sen-hwa ka Cya-ran-cun, kiya do kngkingal hngkawas ida muda "rrigan uda knklaan Rwo-sen-hwa" . Rahuq na pndaan kleegan uuda do, ida srabang spuan qqpahan uuqun tnealang, mangal "Rwo-sen-hwa" ka pusu bi knshyaan uuqun. Kngkingal hnpuyan damac o, ida bnsyaqan qmnqur qqpahan emphapuy tnealang, niqan lhang, knux ni shiya ida niqan kana, qulung dha tdhuun balay. Rgrigan: ‚óéťáĎŚ≥įśļęś≥Č Qhjing/Ulay Cin-fung Qhjing Cin-fung ga niqan Kwang-wu-cyu ka qmqur hmrinas maxal kbkuy na braru qhjing, qhjing o pndaan Syey-ya-tung pusa kaw-ya kaw-wun, embhgay qrngul niya o asi usa karac baraw ni saw bi hnang qung-rung rung! rung! msa.Ida ungac hari qtaan ka "mjiras qhjing". Qtaan bnatas Lwo-seng-hwa-syang-Cing-fung-syang-kung-syow. ca.gov.tw/community/newpage/aboutus.php?CommID=412 Tay-wan-se-cyu-tung - Tay-tung-seyn Cing-fung- syang Cya-ran- se-cyu. ťáĎŚ≥įťĄČ Cing-fung-syang
S.PHON: = madal…üalu = gaga mniq tajtuŇč ¶in*uŇčsjaŇč ka alaŇč madal…üalu. ** sapańß ka kn…ô…ôgu na sapańß, *** ńßiji ka kana knńßb…ĺagan na ńßiji. tnpusu s…ô…ô…üiq o maŇčal **% niqan *** ńßiji sp, …ĺańßuq na uxaj tnpusu s…ô…ô…üiq o maŇčal *% niqan * ńßiji koia. kana ka kl…ô…ôgan s…ô…ô…üiq ga, ńßaŇčan alaŇč alaŇč ma-ta-ja-…ĺu(madal…üalu) pns…ôanak alaŇč kika alaŇč …ômpitu ¶ja-…ĺan- ¶un dńßa. nniqan taj-tuŇč-sj…ôn ¶in-*uŇč-sjaŇč ¶ja-…ĺan- ¶un. llbaŇčan ga pjasan tg ¶iwaj ¶ja-…ĺan ńßija. nniqan lliŇčaj dxgal dgijaq. pgkla ppanan …ĺulu paańß taj-ma-…ĺi-sjaŇč taj-ńß…ô- ¶un mqu…ĺi mg…ĺiq taj-* sj…ôn kgńßak …ôlug ** sj…ôn, mqu…ĺi gqijan ńßidaw mksa jaa bi * km do, dńßuq nniqan alaŇč da. mlutu ¶ t…ôn- ¶ ti-tu t…ôn- ¶ ti-tu alaŇč. klgan s…ô…ô…üiq alaŇč paj-wan- ¶u. ska…ĺi ka…ĺi ka…ĺi paj-wan, ka…ĺi tlu. snńßijaan ¶uŇč- ¶jaw ¶i-tu- ¶jaw, t…ôn- ¶u- ¶jaw. pnjańßan alaŇč pn…ôijańß daja ¶-b…ôn-si na"qa-a-…ĺu-wan"tńß…üil ńßini sajaŇč. mniq sijaw jajuŇč taj-ma-…ĺi ka ¶ja-…ĺan- ¶un, "pu-…ĺu-pu-…ĺu-s…ôŇč"ka plalaj ńßaŇčan na (pul…ô…ĺ pul…ĺ…ô sńß…ôn )(mńß…üil ka…ĺi:…ôgu …ĺuluŇč ni …ĺbuq ka dxgal), spuwan …ômpitu pa…ĺu alaŇč, lnkuwan tanańß tunux siida ka taj-wan o ida dńßija ka kmlawa kana s…ô…ô…üiq, ńßŇčkawas ** mu…ĺi dńßa pniq jajuŇč ¶-p…ôn, jajuŇč ma-…ĺi-wu, jajuŇč ma-nu-…ĺan, daja jajuŇč ma-…ĺi- tow-pu dalaŇč ka tńß…üil.ńßŇčkawas ** idas ** …üijax ** ga ini klwai ka taj-wan do kńßuwaj mijańß tńß…üil ńßini ka kana alaŇč sajaŇč. pgkla …ĺg…ĺigan kwan-kwaŇč ijux qmlańßaŇč dmuuj qu…ĺi …ôndaan s…ô…ô…üiq, ida nkija, qńß…üiŇč dnii ni dmudug smikul nkija kndkilan …ĺ…ĺigan. ¶iŇč-*uŇč-sjaŇč kuŇč-sjwo ga kdadax kŇčkawas ** p…ĺa…üiŇč mowda kana ka ddaun" ¶iŇč-*uŇč-sjaŇč qa-a-…ĺu-wan s…ô- ¶ju ńßnijgan sjow- s…ôn- ¶ju; kija ni ńßŇčkawas ** do gmbgu…ĺańß "qńß…üiŇč ¶iŇč-*uŇč ssaan …ĺg…ĺigan", du…ĺi ni smikul dmudug ida nkija kndkilan llusun kana ka duma na qqpańßun …ĺmigaw. saw ka qqpańßun kuŇč-ji, qqpańßun wun-ńßwa, tqijan s…ô…ô…üiqni uuqun alaŇč dnii, ijux pk…ĺana Ňčalan ńßbaŇčan kl…ôalaŇč. duma u…ĺi o, ida llabaŇč bi ńßnmaan …ĺwo-s…ôn-ńßwa ka ¶ja-…ĺan- ¶un, kija do kŇčkiŇčal ńßŇčkawas ida muda "…ĺ…ĺigan uda knklaan …ĺwo-s…ôn-ńßwa" . …ĺańßuq na pndaan kl…ô…ôgan uuda do, ida s…ĺabaŇč spuan qqpańßan uuqun tn…ôalaŇč, maŇčal "…ĺwo-s…ôn-ńßwa" ka pusu bi knsńßjaan uuqun. kŇčkiŇčal ńßnpujan dama ¶ o, ida bnsjaqan qmnqu…ĺ qqpańßan …ômpńßapuj tn…ôalaŇč, niqan lńßaŇč, knux ni sńßija ida niqan kana, quluŇč dńßa tdńßuun balaj. …ĺg…ĺigan: ***** qńß…üiŇč/ulaj ¶in-*uŇč qńß…üiŇč ¶in-*uŇč ga niqan kwaŇč-wu- ¶ju ka qmqu…ĺ ńßm…ĺinas maxal kbkuj na b…ĺa…ĺu qńß…üiŇč, qńß…üiŇč o pndaan sj…ô-ja-tuŇč pusa kaw-ja kaw-wun, …ômbńßgaj q…ĺŇčul nija o asi usa ka…ĺa ¶ ba…ĺaw ni saw bi ńßnaŇč quŇč-…ĺuŇč …ĺuŇč! …ĺuŇč! msa.ida uŇča ¶ ńßa…ĺi qtaan ka "m…üi…ĺas qńß…üiŇč". qtaan bnatas lwo-s…ôŇč-ńßwa-sjaŇč- ¶iŇč-*uŇč-sjaŇč-kuŇč-sjow. ¶a.go*.tw/ ¶ommunitj/n…ôwpag…ô/aboutus.pńßp? ¶ommid=*** taj-wan-s…ô- ¶ju-tuŇč - taj-tuŇč-s…ôn ¶iŇč-*uŇč- sjaŇč ¶ja-…ĺan- s…ô- ¶ju. *** ¶iŇč-*uŇč-sjaŇč
